Standard SSH key exchange ("kex" if you wanna sound cool).  Diffie-Hellman of
4096 bit key halves, using a known "p" prime and "g" generator.
	KexGroup1)
sha512c
KexGroup16SHA512z
diffie-hellman-group16-sha512l

)Cv3'
